column1: Thu, 27 Sep 2001 12:19:06 -0700 (PDT),Wanda Curry/ENRON@enronXgate on 09/27/2001 09:08 AM,Cynthia Morrow/HOU/EES@EES,Phone Numbers,"This is who both Wanda and Meredith Eggleston used to help them set up their trust.  He is suppose to specialize in Estate and Trust preparation.  I told Mom this morning that I was not confident that Larry has the detail knowledge that we need to get this all set up properly.  She agreed and she said she did not have a problem if we got a second opinion on everything.
Ronald L Lipman - Lipman & Assoc 2719 Colquitt St Houston, TX (713) 840-9600
